name: Consumer Staples Sudden Volume Surge After Price Consolidation

data_sources.notes: daily prices and volume for XLP

trigger.condition: XLP daily range < 0.5% for 7 consecutive days AND volume on day 8 > 120% of 20-day average volume

entry_exit.entry: If XLP daily range < 0.5% for 7 consecutive days AND volume on day 8 > 120% of 20-day average volume
